suggestions.topic: EIP-7904 formal status change decision (DFI from Glamsterdam)
suggestions.rationale: Deferred in #237 pending Geth benchmarks by end of May. All other clients hit 100M gas/sec with BAL optimizations, making removal likely.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-4 status and readiness for devnet-5
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-4 targeted May 21 with multiple clients. Need status update and decision on whether to proceed to devnet-5 or iterate.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7702 delegation BAL change inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from devnet-4 in #237, pending BAL Discord alignment. Needs synchronous decision on whether to include in future devnets.
PFI'd in #236 with open questions on 512 vs other limits. Blocking path to 200M gas floor, which is a Glamsterdam target.
No headliner selected in #233. Three new proposals (8188, 8182, 4758) PFI'd in #237. Need to assess which, if any, could be headliner vs theme-based approach.
Discussed in #236 with action for Toni to update EIP and gather client feedback. No follow-up in #237. Related to Engine API PR 786 decision from #235.
Discussed in #234 with action to continue in Discord. Consensus emerging on 1 month minimum, but no formal decision captured since April.
AA breakout call scheduled in #234 but never materialized. Frame transactions (8141) CFI'd as non-headliner in #233. Scheme transactions (8XXX) mentioned but no progress reported.
